name: Elite Charters Inc
districts_or_customers: Private/event clientele (weddings, proms, corporate, airport, funerals); no confirmed school district contracts
recent_news: No M&A or material news identified; appears to be a small luxury limo/charter operator, not a school-bus contractor.
fit_notes: Not a fit for Summit tuck-in: Elite Charters is a luxury limousine/charter service (weddings, proms, airport), not a school-bus/SPED contractor. No school district business identified.

name: Handi-Van Transport Inc
districts_or_customers: Sarasota, Bradenton, Lakewood Ranch, Venice FL; medical appointments, dialysis, social events, airport; no school district contracts identified
recent_news: No M&A news identified. Active small NEMT operator focused on senior/disabled medical transport.
fit_notes: Not a fit for Summit tuck-in: company is a non-emergency medical/senior transport provider, not a school-bus or SPED-to-school contractor. Out of scope for student transportation platform.

name: Destiny Transportation
districts_or_customers: Metro Atlanta non-emergency medical clientele (doctor appts, dialysis, PT, special events); no school district contracts identified
recent_news: No M&A or growth news identified. Small Atlanta-area NEMT operator. Website destinytransatl.com confirms wheelchair/stretcher NEMT focus.
fit_notes: Not a fit for Summit tuck-in: NEMT/wheelchair operator without school district contracts. Out of scope for K-12 student transportation platform.

name: We Transport
owner_or_parent: Beacon Mobility (Audax Private Equity portfolio company)
principals: Founded by Walter & Edith Marksohn (1959); Marksohn family historically; Elizabeth Hartley listed as exec post-acquisition
districts_or_customers: Long Island (Nassau & Suffolk), NYC, Westchester County, Connecticut; ten depots; serves Bedford Central SD and many others; includes affiliates Towne Bus Corp and Van Trans LLC
recent_news: Acquired by Beacon Mobility (Audax Private Equity portfolio) in 2021 — 7th platform under Audax ownership. Now operates as part of Beacon family.
fit_notes: NOT a tuck-in target — already owned by Beacon Mobility/Audax (direct PE-owned competitor to Summit/I Squared). Exclude from buyer universe; relevant as competitive intel only.

name: Northern Express Bus Svc
districts_or_customers: Berlin WI HQ; serves Ripon Area School District (started 2022-23 SY) plus 5-6 other Wisconsin school districts; purchased a bus terminal at 525 E Fond du Lac St, Ripon
recent_news: Won Ripon Area SD contract in 2022 as most competitively priced of 4 bidders, replacing longtime incumbent Lamers Bus Lines; Walker noted driver-shortage challenges; expanded with Ripon terminal acquisition.
fit_notes: Plausible small Midwest tuck-in: owner-operator (Jeff Walker) family-run school-bus contractor with 5-7 WI district contracts and recent terminal expansion. WI not currently a Summit core state — would be a market entry rather than bolt-on; size is sub-scale (~$1.3M rev, ~39 employees) but clean independent. Worth tracking, low urgency.
